title: Courses Offered and Merit List Links

detail.title: Courses Offered and Merit List Links
detail.short_info: Vartak College Vasai Merit List 2026 for FYBA, FYBCom & FYBSc First Year admissions 2026-27 is now available. Download First Merit List PDFs directly from www.avc.ac.in and check your name, cut-off & admission schedule.

content.text: Vartak College Vasai Merit List 2026 for First Year UG admissions (FYBA, FYBCom, FYBSc) has been released / is being released as per the schedule. Check the first merit list for BA, BCom and BSc programmes on the official college website www.avc.ac.in. Vidyavardhini’s Annasaheb Vartak College (AVC), Vasai has started publishing the merit lists for First Year Undergraduate admissions for the academic year 2026-27.

sections.heading: Vartak College Vasai Merit List 2026 Overview
Courses Offered and Merit List Links
How to Check Vartak College Vasai Merit List 2026

items: Go to the Merit List 2026-27 section.
Click on the respective course merit list PDF (FYBA / FYBCom / FYBSc).
Download and search your name / application number using Ctrl + F.
Follow the instructions given in the merit list for document verification and fee payment.
Passed 12th Standard (HSC) from any recognized board.
Minimum required percentage as per University of Mumbai guidelines and category-wise reservation.
Merit is prepared based on aggregate marks in qualifying examination.
